## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] chore / refactor / ci / build / test

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch follows naming convention (`feat/...`, `fix/...`, `chore/...`)
- [ ] Conventional commit messages
- [ ] `make lint test` passes locally
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]` if user-facing
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if behavior or flags changed
